library.description: TestCafe is a pure node.js end-to-end solution for testing web apps. It takes care of all the stages: starting browsers, running tests, gathering test results and generating reports. TestCafe doesn’t need browser plugins - it works in all popular modern browsers out-of-the-box.
library.name: TestCafe

library.description: deepstream.io is a new type of server that powers scalable realtime apps. it's open source, designed for speed and reliability, offering developers and enterprises all the features necessary to create messaging and collaboration tools; multiplayer games, financial trading platforms, interactive dashboards, IoT technologies and microservice architectures.
library.name: deepstream.io
